author: Pokémon 公式
text:
🏆 Pokémon Champions is coming to mobile platforms June 17!
🏆 Take the Battle Arena with you when Pokémon Champions comes to iOS and Android on June 17!✨

Find all your favorite Pokémon merchandise at the official Pokémon Center: https://www.pokemoncenter.com/

Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/pokemon
